title: Framed
description: The Guild needs a rival merchant discredited. Steal from the jeweler's shop and plant the stolen goods in Marcus the blacksmith's home. Make it look like he's the thief.

objectives.description: Steal jewelry from the jeweler's shop
Plant the stolen jewelry in Marcus's home

moral_choice.description: You can choose to plant the evidence or warn Marcus instead
moral_choice.good_option: Warn Marcus about the frame job

notes: Stealth and deception test. Player has moral choice. Jeweler and blacksmith should be in Dalhurst.
